sharing my thoughts, progress, and screenshots of video games i've played! spoilers will be hidden!

here's my backloggd for a comprehensive list of everything i've played / completed / want to play / etc!

gaming log page inspired by my favorite video game hyper light drifter, the drifter pagedoll is from official art!

fonts used on this page: bangalore, nintendo DS BIOS, basiic

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
